refnamediv.refpurpose: Searches for a subimage and returns a similarity map

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
image
The Imagick object holding the subimage to search for.
offset
If supplied, this variable is populated with the coordinates and size of the region where the best match was found.
similarity
If supplied, this variable is populated with the computed similarity value of the best match, where lower values indicate a closer match.
threshold
The minimum similarity required for a region to be considered a match.
metric
One of the Imagick::METRIC_* constants specifying the metric used to measure the difference between images.
